Now, the helper function to check if a string is made by repeating a substring x.

Implement a function that, given a string s and a candidate x, checks if s is x repeated k times.

So, in code:

private boolean isRepeated(String s, String x) {

    if (x.length() == 0) return false;

    int k = s.length() / x.length();

    for (int i=0; i <k; i++) {

        if (!s.substring(i*x.length(), (i+1)*x.length()).equals(x)) {

            return false;

        }

    }

    return true;

}

Now, the helper function to check if a string is made by repeating a substring x.

Implement a function that, given a string s and a candidate x, checks if s is x repeated k times.

So, in code:

private boolean isRepeated(String s, String x) {

    if (x.length() == 0) return false;

    int k = s.length() / x.length();

    for (int i=0; i <k; i++) {

        if (!s.substring(i*x.length(), (i+1)*x.length()).equals(x)) {

            return false;

        }

    }

    return true;

}
